name: design-space
description: Local Claude Design host for coding agents: canvas, tweaks, comments, edit overrides, and refinement Q&A.

interface.shortDescription: Local design canvas, tweaks, comments, and Q&A for coding agents.
interface.longDescription: Design Space lets Codex work with a local Claude Design-style host. The plugin packages the design-space skill and MCP tools for reading comments and overrides, asking refinement questions, polling review events, exporting feedback, and resolving comments while humans preview designs in the browser.
defaultPrompt: Create Design Space artboard variants with tweaks
Read Design Space feedback and apply comments
Ask refinement questions for the active design
